rationale: Cycle 13 was bug hunt + cleanup. Cycle 14 is feature cycle. Chose FACTION-BOOST-WEIGHT (q-20260415-010 creator answer: boost_weight) because reputation system currently has no effect on card selection — making rep>=50 meaningless gameplay-wise. This feature makes faction reputation directly influence which cards appear, creating a positive feedback loop: invest in a faction → see more of its content. Bible-compliant (s.3.2 content_threshold=50, seasonal pool weights precedent in s.7.3).
next_cycle_plan: Bug hunt C14: verify faction boost logic correctness in edge cases (empty pool, all factions unlocked, no factions unlocked). Then feature: SFXEngine wiring into active game loop (q-20260414-006), or biome walk event pools, or GameFlowController wrapping (q-20260415-011).
